blended.narrative: Hunter Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 57°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
